plainEnglish: This is the Level AAA version of 3.3.4, applied to all forms that submit information—not just legal, financial, or data-changing ones. Any submission should be reversible, error-checked, or confirmable before finalizing. Give every form a safety net.
whyItMatters: Users with disabilities can make submission mistakes on any form, not just high-stakes ones, when there's no error check, confirmation, or way to reverse it.
quickCheck: Confirm every form that submits information offers error checking, a review/confirm step, or reversibility.
commonMistakes: Submitting any form with no validation or confirmation step.
Providing no way to edit or undo a submission after sending.
Assuming only payment forms need a safety net.

codeExamples.label: Validate, then confirm before submitting
codeExamples.code:
{/* A safety net on an ordinary form, not just checkout */}
<button onClick={validateThenConfirm}>Review and submit</button>

codeExamples.label: Form submits immediately with no checks
codeExamples.code:
{/* No validation or confirmation */}
<form onSubmit={submitNow}>{/* fields */}</form>
